settings.heading: Downloads framework
settings.copy: Designed for drivers, firmware, utilities, and future structured resource indexing.

settings.heading: Downloadable resources by product or task
settings.copy: This section is ready to evolve into a metaobject-backed resource index with product associations, platforms, and version metadata.
settings.source_note: Later phases can map these entries to resource metaobjects with versioning, platform metadata, and product relationships.

settings.title: Firmware resource entry
settings.copy: Reserved for version notes, platform details, and linked product scope.

settings.title: Driver resource entry
settings.copy: Reserved for OS compatibility, release notes, and install guidance.

settings.title: Tool or utility entry
settings.copy: Reserved for software tools, helper apps, and update resources.

settings.heading: Not sure which download applies to your setup?
settings.copy: This callout can route customers into compatibility guidance or direct support without interrupting the resource flow.
